VO_EN: You say the good ones.
VO_VI: Ban noi loai tot.

VO_EN: He nods.
VO_VI: No gat dau.

VO_EN: Goes back to his LEGO.
VO_VI: Quay lai choi LEGO.

VO_EN: He's building something new.
VO_VI: No dang xay cai gi moi.

VO_EN: You ask what.
VO_VI: Ban hoi cai gi.

VO_EN: A dome.
VO_VI: Mot cai vom.

VO_EN: He places a tiny figure inside.
VO_VI: No dat mot hinh nho ben trong.

VO_EN: That's you Daddy.
VO_VI: Do la bo Daddy.

VO_EN: The figure is safe under the dome.
VO_VI: Hinh nho an toan duoi vom.

VO_EN: The figure is smiling.
VO_VI: Hinh nho dang cuoi.

VO_EN: The dome is made of plastic.
VO_VI: Cai vom lam bang nhua.

VO_EN: You go to the bathroom.
VO_VI: Ban vao nha ve sinh.

VO_EN: You close the door.
VO_VI: Ban dong cua.

VO_EN: You press your forehead against the mirror.
VO_VI: Ban ap tran vao guong.

VO_EN: Your hands grip the sink edge.
VO_VI: Tay ban bam mep bon rua.

VO_EN: The porcelain is cold under your fingers.
VO_VI: Su lanh duoi ngon tay.

VO_EN: Something in your chest catches - not pain - just a skip - and then it's gone.
VO_VI: Cai gi do trong nguc ban nghen lai - khong phai dau - chi la mot nhip lac - roi het.

VO_EN: You breathe.
VO_VI: Ban tho.

VO_EN: You step on a LEGO piece in the hallway that night.
VO_VI: Ban giam phai mot mieng LEGO trong hanh lang dem do.

VO_EN: When the ceasefire comes you expect something to change. Nothing does.
VO_VI: Khi ngung ban den ban mong doi dieu gi do thay doi. Khong co gi thay doi.

VO_EN: They fix the playground. New fence, new swing set. Your son won't go near it.
VO_VI: Ho sua lai san choi. Hang rao moi, xich du moi. Con trai khong chiu lai gan.

VO_EN: The cafe is open. The barista moved to Berlin.
VO_VI: Quan ca phe mo lai. Co nhan vien pha che da chuyen di Berlin.

VO_EN: Nobody told you, you just showed up one day and someone else was behind the counter.
VO_VI: Khong ai bao ban, ban chi den mot ngay va nguoi khac dung sau quay.

VO_EN: She makes your coffee. No smiley face. Same taste. Exactly the same.
VO_VI: Co ay pha ca phe. Khong mat cuoi. Cung vi do. Y chang.

VO_EN: You drink it anyway.
VO_VI: Ban van uong.

VO_EN: Your neighbor came back from miluim.
VO_VI: Hang xom ve tu miluim.

VO_EN: He doesn't talk about where he was.
VO_VI: Anh ta khong noi ve noi da o.

VO_EN: He smokes on the balcony at 3 AM.
VO_VI: Anh ta hut thuoc tren ban cong luc 3 gio sang.

VO_EN: You see his cigarette glow from yours.
VO_VI: Ban thay diem lua tu ban cong cua ban.

VO_EN: Neither of you waves.
VO_VI: Khong ai vay tay.

VO_EN: You don't need to.
VO_VI: Khong can.

VO_EN: You both know what the other one is doing awake at 3 AM.
VO_VI: Hai nguoi deu biet nguoi kia dang lam gi khi thuc luc 3 gio sang.

VO_EN: Your wife sleeps with her hand on the go-bag.
VO_VI: Vo ban ngu tay dat tren tui khan cap.

VO_EN: Every night.
VO_VI: Moi dem.

VO_EN: You tried moving it once.
VO_VI: Ban thu chuyen tui di mot lan.

VO_EN: She moved it back without saying anything.
VO_VI: Co ay chuyen lai ma khong noi gi.

VO_EN: The LEGO dome is on the shelf in the mamad.
VO_VI: Vom LEGO nam tren ke trong phong an toan.

VO_EN: The tiny figure is still inside.
VO_VI: Hinh nho van o ben trong.

VO_EN: Still smiling.
VO_VI: Van cuoi.

VO_EN: Your son still counts to ninety before he sleeps.
VO_VI: Con trai van dem toi chin muoi truoc khi ngu.

VO_EN: You stopped counting.
VO_VI: Ban ngung dem.

VO_EN: That is how you know something broke.
VO_VI: Do la cach ban biet co gi do da gay.

VO_EN: A car door slams on the street.
VO_VI: Cua xe dong sam tren duong.

VO_EN: Your chest tightens.
VO_VI: Nguc ban that lai.

VO_EN: Your feet move toward the hallway before your brain says stop.
VO_VI: Chan ban buoc ve phia hanh lang truoc khi nao kip ngan.

VO_EN: You stand there for a moment - hallway light off - door still closed - and for one second everything blurs and you can't remember if the ceasefire already happened or if you dreamed it.
VO_VI: Ban dung do mot chut - den hanh lang tat - cua van dong - va trong mot giay moi thu nhoa di va ban khong nho ngung ban da xay ra hay ban mo.

VO_EN: Then you walk back.
VO_VI: Roi ban quay lai.

VO_EN: You don't mention it.
VO_VI: Ban khong noi gi.

VO_EN: The sirens stopped.
VO_VI: Coi bao dong ngung.

VO_EN: Your body did not.
VO_VI: Co the ban thi khong.

VO_EN: You're alive.
VO_VI: Ban con song.

VO_EN: The dome held.
VO_VI: Vom giu duoc.

VO_EN: Everyone says that should be enough.
VO_VI: Moi nguoi noi the la du.

VO_EN: It is not.
VO_VI: Khong du.
